sections.name: PTE_PEOPLE
sections.description: Navigator for PTE people-related sections.

sections.name: PTE
sections.description: PTE domain dashboard and navigation root for exam practice, feedback, and progress tools.

sections.name: PTE_STUDENTS
sections.description: Manage PTE applicants/students lifecycle, packages, and supporting documents.

sections.name: PTE_QUESTIONS_BANK
sections.description: Author, version, and manage PTE question bank items with immutable published revisions.

sections.name: PTE_TESTS
sections.description: Define and version PTE tests, allocating published questions across all four skills.

sections.name: PTE_ATTEMPT
sections.description: Navigator for PTE runtime attempt records, details, and performance views.

sections.name: PTE_ATTEMPT_LEDGER
sections.description: Browse event-level runtime attempt ledger entries across PTE attempts.

sections.name: PTE_ATTEMPT_DETAILS
sections.description: Detailed per-attempt session and item drill-down view.

sections.name: PTE_ATTEMPT_OVERALL_PERFORMANCE
sections.description: Overall learner performance, trends, and analytics view.

sections.name: PTE_PRACTICE
sections.description: Navigator for PTE practice sections.

sections.name: PTE_PRACTICE_BY_SKILLS
sections.description: Run skill-based PTE practice sessions with type multi-select and runtime ledger tracking.

sections.name: PTE_FEEDBACK
sections.description: Navigator for PTE feedback sections.

sections.name: PTE_FEEDBACK_ON_PRACTICE
sections.description: Review started practice sessions and provide per-question feedback for learners.

sections.name: PTE_COURSES
sections.description: Manage PTE courses with teachers, students, schedules, and lifecycle status.

sections.name: PTE_TEACHERS
sections.description: Manage PTE teachers linked to person records, courses, and lifecycle status.

sections.name: PTE_AI_ASSISST
sections.description: Navigator for PTE AI provider and key settings.

sections.name: PTE_AI_PROVIDER_KEYS
sections.description: Define API providers and keys for PTE AI-assisted features.

sections.name: PTE_SCORING
sections.description: Navigator for PTE scoring tools and defaults management.

sections.name: PTE_SCORING_DEFAULTS
sections.description: Manage global scoring defaults by PTE question type with revision history.

sections.name: PTE_AI_TOKEN_USAGE
sections.description: Track PTE AI communication usage with token consumption and runtime metadata.

sections.name: PTE_AI_SCORING_SETTINGS
sections.description: Assign PTE scoring question types to saved AI provider keys and models.

sections.name: PTE_MOCK_EXAMS
sections.description: Run strict PTE mock exams from published registered tests with real-test timing and sequencing rules.

sections.name: PTE_SMART_PRACTICE
sections.description: Generate adaptive PTE practice plans from student performance, self-rated difficulty, and question difficulty.

sections.name: PTE_PUBLIC_APPLICANTS
sections.description: Manage applicants who joined from the public PTE website flow.

sections.name: PTE_PUBLIC_PAGE
sections.description: Manage public PTE landing page content, slider images, calls to action, and applicant information.

sections.name: PTE_TOOLS_AND_REPORTS
sections.description: You can find useful tools and reports here on this page.
